evidence.value: User explicitly designated sample/무한회귀.txt as the remake source. Preserve 이한결, 한시연, 모노리스, 무한 회귀, 무회갤, the clear-point extinction contract, and difficulty system while rewriting prose and scene assembly.
Story Bible 1.0.0 locks the original protagonist/world and defines the remake-only 10-episode arc without changing core canon.
Episodes 1-10 progress from apocalypse and first regression through tutorial clear, government contact, first-floor checkpoint, and 한시연 contact.

uncertainties: The source TXT has damaged chapter markers, so episode boundaries are remade from stable plot milestones rather than copied mechanically.
